_comment: Combined-universe campaign index. schema_version bumps if you add required fields. New entry shape: { id, character, status, state_file, story_files[], regions_established[], lore_role, optional supersedes_note }. Paths relative to TTRPG folder.

calendar.notes: Optional: set era_label when you want a named year in prose. Per-campaign day counters in *_state.json stay local unless you sync for a crossover.

campaigns.lore_role: Eastern frontier — Greenveil corruption resolved; local hero legend; deed at Briarstone.
Academy / ArchMagus arc — portals, constructs, Bleakmoor convergence, Council pressure; heartland and west.
